label: The Lockseal Vaultroom
description: The Lockseal Vaultroom serves as the Nightcaliber Exchange’s secured storage chamber, cut directly into the bastion’s vitrified basalt and lined with blackened metal shelving in regimented aisles. Numbered restraint bars and mag-sealed lockers divide ammunition, weapon components, and promethium-treated kit into tamper-evident bays beneath a constant, low mechanical thrum. A gasketed bulkhead and overbuilt filtration hood keep ash and electrostatic grit from settling on oiled stocks and ceramite cases. Lumen strips behind wire guards cast hard, clinical light across slagcrete decking scored by crate skids and drag marks.
